content.en:
While Ye Tian was making rapid progress, the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain were also making rapid progress.

In addition to occasionally entering the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate, Ye Tian also used his status as a general to obtain a few places for his Nine Extremes Legion, so that they could also occasionally enter the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate.

Of course, all the expenses were paid by Ye Tian himself.

After all, his Nine Extremes Legion has been cultivating in the Nine Extremes Space, and those True Ancestors are very poor, where is the capital to go to the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate!

Ye Tian's expectation for the Nine Extremes Legion was very simple, that is, to cultivate a few top True Ancestors as soon as possible, otherwise without the combat power of the Top True Ancestors, it would be difficult to go out to do tasks.

this day.

Ye Tian was contemplating the Great Wilderness Law Body, and this Thousand Dao Technique had already been cultivated by him to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, although he had rarely practiced in the past few years.

But now, he vaguely felt that he was going to break this shackle and cultivate this Thousand Dao Technique to the Dacheng realm.

A Thousand Dao Techniques of the Dacheng Realm, and how terrifying the power is.

Moreover, his Great Wilderness Law Body has both defense and amplification effects, and once he reaches the Dacheng realm, he may be able to break an ancient realm record again.

That's right, that's the record of the strongest defense!

Ye Tian has never broken this record, and the True Ancestor who created this record is also an invincible True Ancestor, the other party may have also cultivated a Thousand Defense Dao Technique to the Dacheng realm, but the other party's foundation is definitely not as deep as his.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian cultivated the Great Wilderness Law Body to the Dacheng realm, he would definitely be able to break the opponent's record in defense.

Year after year.

Ye Tian almost gave up other aspects of cultivation and went all out to attack the Dacheng realm of the Great Wilderness Law Body.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough.

Just after Ye Tian's Great Wilderness Law Body broke through to the Dacheng realm, the strongest defense record on the Xuanxu List was broken by Ye Tian.

At this moment, countless forces were stunned by Ye Tian's record.

Previously, although Ye Tian had created four records, those four records only proved Ye Tian's potential and talent, and he could not be called the strongest in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

But the strongest defense is one of the strongest proofs, even strong people like the bloody general and the Ferris general don't have such a record, but Ye Tian broke it when others had already created the strongest defense record.

This is enough to prove how terrifying Ye Tian's defense is.

And the defense is so terrifying, the combat power will naturally not be bad.

--------------

King Kong City.

This is an eight-heaven force, with the city as the headquarters of the sect, and once had a large number of cities in the domain realm, and its prestige was very great.

The strength of King Kong City is very strong, not weaker than that of the Heavenly Sword Sect, and many forces are unwilling to offend King Kong City, because the defense and life-saving ability of the disciples of King Kong City are too terrifying.

The most famous battle was when ten Supreme True Ancestors besieged one of the Supreme True Ancestors in King Kong City in a forbidden place, and they failed to kill each other for tens of thousands of years.

At this time, the Unbroken True Ancestor, who was known as the First True Ancestor of King Kong City, was very angry.

He is the true ancestor who created the strongest defense before, he once entered the talent ancestral pool, obtained a defensive Dao-level natal talent, and cultivated the famous Thousand Dao Technique of King Kong City - King Kong Unbreakable, and cultivated to the Dacheng realm in one fell swoop, and reached the peak realm of Dacheng, only one step away from consummation.

But he never expected that his own terrible defense would be broken!

"Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, who is this guy, why haven't I heard of it!"

The True Ancestor was annoyed that he had been broken by a not-so-famous True Ancestor, and if several of his opponents broke his own record, he would not be so angry.

Soon, he learned the origin of this Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor from the mouths of the other True Ancestors in King Kong City.

"It turned out to be a native of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and this is his fifth record!"

The True Ancestor was surprised.

Such a talent is amazing, it's incredible.

"Could it be that this guy has cultivated a Thousand Dao Techniques in the Defensive Category to the Perfection Realm?" thought to the True Ancestor.

But this step is too difficult!

Even if you have a defensive Dao-level natal talent, if you want to cultivate a Thousand Dao Technique to the consummation realm, the difficulty can be called against the sky.

He has cultivated the Thousand Dao Technique in the Door of Vajra Immortal for countless years, and there are still many treasures to increase, but after such a long time, he still can't break the shackles.

At the True Ancestor level, if you want to cultivate a Thousand Dao Techniques to the consummation realm, the difficulty is second only to stepping into the ranks of Supreme True Ancestors.

"It's a pity that this guy is the general of Black Wind Mountain, otherwise it would be nice to pull him into our King Kong City!"

Don't break the true ancestor and regret it.

......

"Sure enough, the record for the strongest defense was broken!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Sitting on the five Ancient Realm records, the effect of the increase is too amazing, if he continues to break the records, even if he doesn't use the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate, his speed will not be too slow.

"If I can cultivate Tiangang extremely fast to the Dacheng realm, I'm afraid I can also break the speed record. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, his Tiangang Extreme Speed Cultivation Time was late after all, and he had only just stepped into the Xiaocheng realm, and he was still far away from the Dacheng realm.

"In fact, if you want to quickly cultivate the Zhongqian Dao Technique to the Dacheng realm, it's not impossible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The way to do this is to fuse more Dao-level natal talents of the same kind!

His copying talent can now be fused with Dao-level natal talents, such as two Dao-level natal talents that involve defense, once they are fused into one Dao-level natal talent, his talent will inevitably be more powerful, and his cultivation of the Great Wilderness Law Body will inevitably be accelerated.

Similarly, if the two speed-like Dao-level natal talents were fused, then the cultivation of Tiangang's extreme speed would inevitably be faster.

In the past, Ye Tian couldn't find many Dao-level natal talents, but now there are not many Dao-level natal talents in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, such as a few in Black Wind Mountain, and he has already copied them.

If the Dao-level natal talents of those True Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm were copied one by one, there should be quite a few of them, maybe more than a hundred!

The only trouble now is that he doesn't know which people have Dao-level natal talents, and if he is asked to investigate, he has no spare time.

And if it is handed over to someone else to investigate, this person will definitely be selected.

First of all, the true ancestor of the Void Heaven True Country, he is not very at ease, and it is easy to leak news.

"By the way, the Nine Extremes Legion hasn't sent out a mission yet, so I'll give them this task this time and let them help me investigate!"

Ye Tian thought.

So, he descended on the Nine Poles Space and recruited the True Ancestors of the Nine Poles Legion.

"Meet the General!"

"Meet the General!"

"Meet the General!"

Many True Ancestors greeted Ye Tian with a rigorous military posture.

Ye Tian glanced around, and then said: "You have been cultivating here for a long time, I will issue you a task today, if you complete it well, I will give you a reward!"

As soon as they heard that there was a mission, the true ancestors of the Nine Poles Legion were excited.

Although the Nine Poles Space is large, it is too boring here, they have long wanted to go out to do tasks, but without Ye Tian's permission, no one dares to leave, and there is no way to leave.

"You guys will check for me which True Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm have Dao-level natal talents, you just need to tell us who they are and which forces they are in, this task should not be difficult, but the main thing is not to attract the attention of which forces. "

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes, General!"

Many True Ancestors responded to the Tao.

Immediately, Ye Tian took these True Ancestors out of the Nine Extremes Space and let them disperse to various places in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to investigate the matter of Dao-level natal talent.

And Ye Tian slowly waited for the news.

In a flash, decades passed.

During this period, one message after another was delivered, and each message represented the whereabouts of a Dao-level natal talent.

Now, decades have passed, and there is less and less news, which proves that the Dao-level natal talent has basically been investigated.

"103 Dao-level natal talents!"

Ye Tian read this information completely and nodded with satisfaction.

Next, he wanted to copy the Dao-level natal talents of these True Ancestors.
